reviews.comment:
Muy buena onda los playeros.
Pero si vas por la 7 rumbo a mendoza tenes otra ypf sobre la ruta sin necesidad de entrar  al pueblo. Hay solo 2 surtidores.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants were really friendly.

But if you're heading towards Mendoza on Route 7, there's another YPF station right on the highway without having to go into town. There are only two gas pumps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXdDY3QS1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bella la YPF de la paz.....podría ponerle una platita la petrolera y modenizarla un poco ...pero para ellos solo importa la facturacion parece como no vende tanto como otras no la renuevan......

(Translated by Google)
The YPF station in La Paz is beautiful... the oil company could invest some money in it and modernize it a bit... but for them, only revenue seems to matter; since it doesn't sell as much as others, they don't renovate it...
